title: Cobblemon Pojav
description: The full cobblemon experience, now on Pojav!
body:
Embark on the ultimate Pokémon adventure in the world of Minecraft! Cobblemon Adventures: The Complete Journey is a feature-packed modpack built on Cobblemon for PojavLauncher, designed to bring the authentic Pokémon experience to life on mobile and other platforms. Catch, train, and battle your way to becoming the very best, with a host of addons that expand the world beyond the ordinary.

This pack includes everything a Pokémon Master-in-training needs:

The Core Experience: At its heart is Cobblemon, faithfully recreating the Pokémon universe in Minecraft with all the core mechanics you know and love.

Conquer the Gyms: Prove your strength by challenging a series of custom-built Gyms, each with specialized-type leaders and their powerful teams. Earn badges and claim your place in the Hall of Fame!

Ride and Fly: Explore the vast, blocky world in style! The Ridable Pokémon addon allows you to saddle up your favorite Pokémon. Race across the plains on an Arcanine, soar over mountains on a Charizard, or dive into ocean depths on a Lapras.

Trainer Battles Galore: The world is no longer empty! You'll encounter NPC Trainers of all kinds—from Bug Catchers in the forest to Veterans on mountaintops. Challenge them to earn valuable experience, money, and respect.

And So Much More! This pack is rounded out with a selection of quality-of-life and immersion mods, including:

Player & Pokémon Healing to keep your team in fighting shape.

Custom Structures to make the world feel alive and explorable.

Optimization Mods to ensure a smooth experience on PojavLauncher.

Ready to begin your journey? Download Cobblemon Adventures: The Complete Journey today and catch 'em all!
